steps.title: Read the speed constraint from the problem
steps.content: The problem directly states that $25 \leq x \leq 65$ represents the speed constraint. This is a compound inequality: the speed $x$ must be at least 25 mph and at most 65 mph.

steps.title: Find the matching choice
steps.content:
Compare each choice to the constraint $25 \leq x \leq 65$:
  • Choice A: $x \geq 25$ — only the lower bound; omits the upper limit
  • Choice B: $x \geq 65$ — wrong; this says speed is at least 65, contradicting the problem
  • Choice C: $25 \leq x \leq 65$ — exact match
  • Choice D: $x \leq 90$ — an upper bound not given in the problem
That matches choice C — C is correct.
